gold.rationale: 文本对“网传发现恐龙化石”的事实属性给出了正确澄清：该点位更接近景区展陈装置而非真实化石，整体结论与公开辟谣信息一致；但导语与图注在语境上强化了“自然遗存/岩层露头”的联想，且所配图片呈现的场景与文中叙述的“栈道旁岩壁嵌入骨架装置”并不匹配，容易造成读者对事件现场与性质的误解。

atoms: 一名女记者手持带有CCTV标志的麦克风，站在红岩地貌前。
记者身旁立着一块黑色告示牌，上面有红色和白色文字。
告示牌上的文字为：【紧急公告】乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为【不实消息】请勿信谣，一切以官方发布为准。
背景中有两名身穿黄色反光背心的警察。
右侧有多名围观群众，部分人正在用手机拍摄。
现场拉有黄黑相间的警戒带，上面印有KEEP OUT字样。
背景是覆盖着绿色植被的山丘。
一块蓝白相间的告示牌立在土坡上。
告示牌上的文字为：「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。新闻辟谣—调查现场。
两名戴着黄色安全帽的工人蹲在地上，手持小铲子正在挖掘。
一名戴着白色安全帽、身穿黄色反光背心的女性站在告示牌旁。
背景是土坡和远处的山丘。
右侧有一辆蓝色的三轮车停在路边。
一名戴口罩的男子蹲在河边的岩石旁，手指向地面。
旁边站着一名戴着黄色安全帽、身穿黄色反光背心的工作人员。
现场拉有黄黑相间的警戒带。
警戒带上挂着两块白色告示牌。
左侧告示牌文字为：严禁擅自挖掘。
右侧告示牌文字为：经核实非化石。请勿信谣。
背景是河流和红色的丹霞地貌山峰。
一名戴着蓝色安全帽、身穿蓝色马甲的女性正在用工具清理岩壁。
两名男子站在她旁边，其中一人手持平板电脑查看。
背景中有多名记者和摄影师正在拍摄。
岩壁旁立着一块白色告示牌。
告示牌上的文字为：四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石报道调查现场。
背景远处有一个中式牌坊。
一名戴着帽子的男子蹲在地上，手持放大镜观察一块石头。
旁边站着一名女性，手持写字板和相机。
背景中有一块大型白色告示牌。
告示牌上的文字为：关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告 此为不实信息！经权威古生物学家实地考察，该发现非恐龙化石，属自然地理堆积。
现场拉有黄黑相间的警戒带。
背景是连绵的青山。
一面巨大的岩壁上嵌有一个完整的恐龙骨架模型。
骨架包括头骨、脊椎、肋骨和四肢。
岩壁表面有苔藓和藤蔓植物生长。
岩壁下方是一条铺设好的柏油路。
右侧有树木的枝叶伸入画面。

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一名女记者站在红岩地貌前，手持带有CCTV标志的麦克风，身旁立着一块写有“紧急公告”和“不实消息”的黑色告示牌。背景中有警察和围观群众，现场拉有警戒带。
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 【紧急公告】乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为【不实消息】请勿信谣，一切以官方发布为准。CCTV
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image visually depicts a press conference debunking the dinosaur fossil rumor, which aligns with the post's narrative about the investigation.

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一块蓝白告示牌写着“乐山一景区发现恐龙化石不实”，旁边有工作人员在土坡上进行挖掘调查。背景是土坡和山丘。
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。新闻辟谣—调查现场
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows an on-site investigation confirming the rumor is false, consistent with the post's description of the debunking process.

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一名男子在河边岩石旁蹲下，旁边有工作人员和警戒带。警戒带上挂着“严禁擅自挖掘”和“经核实非化石”的告示牌。背景是河流和丹霞地貌。
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 严禁擅自挖掘 经核实非化石。请勿信谣。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows officials inspecting the site and placing signs to stop unauthorized digging, matching the post's account of the investigation.

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一名工作人员正在清理岩壁，旁边有官员和记者围观。岩壁旁立有“四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石报道调查现场”的告示牌。
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石报道调查现场
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image captures the investigation scene at the rock wall, aligning with the post's description of officials examining the site.

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一名男子在挖掘现场用放大镜观察石头，旁边有女性记录。背景是一块大型告示牌，声明“此为不实信息”。
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告 此为不实信息！经权威古生物学家实地考察，该发现非恐龙化石，属自然地理堆积。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows experts examining the site and a formal notice declaring the rumor false, consistent with the post's narrative.

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一面岩壁上嵌有一个巨大的恐龙骨架模型，周围有苔藓和藤蔓。下方是柏油路。
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows the dinosaur skeleton model described in the post as a tourist attraction, confirming its existence as a display rather than a fossil.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of the 'dinosaur skeleton' embedded in the rock wall at Jianwei Bagou Scenic Area
image_2 is used to illustrate the author's description of the 'Jurassic filter' effect created by the ferns and misty canyon environment
image_3 is offered as proof of the 'immersive exploration moment' where tourists encounter the skeleton model while walking on the boardwalk
image_4 is shown to support the claim that the skeleton is a realistic display model integrated into the rock face for educational purposes
image_5 is used to demonstrate the specific photographic angles (like the 'first view' at turn A) that create the illusion of a fossil discovery
image_6 is presented as the actual 'dinosaur skeleton' landscape that the author describes as a popular photo spot for visitors

retrieved_evidence.text: 【“四川乐山一景区发现恐龙化石”不实】近日，一则“乐山市犍为县芭沟镇发现完整恐龙化石”的消息在网上流传，评论中指出“恐龙化石”位于嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区，引发关注。对此，该景区回应称，网传“恐龙化石”实为景区内一座嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架模型，由于造型逼真，与周边桫椤林融为一体，且部分时段可免费进入参观，致使不少游客和网民误认其为真实化石。景区内至今未发现过真正的恐龙化石。（来源：“乐山文旅”微信公众号）
据四川省乐山市文化和旅游部门近日介绍，网民讨论的“恐龙化石”地点位于犍为县芭沟镇嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区相关区域。该景区依托嘉阳矿区遗址与桫椤植被景观，近年来吸引了大量周边游客前往观光体验。当地文旅机构称，景区在部分游览步道沿线设置了以恐龙为主题的观赏点位，结合桫椤林湿润幽暗的环境特点，形成较为独特的自然与主题景观组合，成为犍为县重点打造的特色旅游板块之一。
嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区位于四川乐山犍为县芭沟镇，以成片分布的古老桫椤林与湖泊、栈道等自然景观闻名。近年来，当地依托森林和水体营造环湖步道、临水平台等游憩空间，游客可在桫椤林下行走，近距离感受亚热带湿润环境。据相关介绍，景区将自然植被保护与观光体验结合，成为犍为旅游的一张新名片。
针对网络平台上流传的“恐龙化石”图片，当地文旅部门工作人员近日在接受采访时表示，画面中所显示的并非新近出土的古生物遗存，而是嘉阳桫椤湖景区内嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架模型装置。据了解，该装置由景区运营方出于场景营造和主题展示需要设置，位置靠近主要游线，便于游客近距离观察拍照。相关人士强调，该设施属于景观布置的一部分，与科学考古发掘并无直接关联。
记者在对嘉阳桫椤湖景区公开资料和现场信息进行梳理时注意到，景区目前在对外发布的游览指南、宣传海报及现场展陈说明中，并未出现“发现真正恐龙化石”的公告或专门介绍。当地文旅部门人士称，现阶段景区内有关恐龙元素的呈现以景观装置和科普展示为主，具体内容以游客服务中心和官方发布信息为准。后续如有新的展览或考古成果对外公布，预计将通过既有渠道进行说明。
嵌入岩壁的“恐龙骨架”展陈点位于嘉阳桫椤湖景区步道一侧，为景区布置的立体模型装置。根据景区管理方说明，该骨架采用金属和仿真材料制作，通过固定点与岩壁连接，外形按照恐龙骨骼造型设计，刻意保留脊柱、肋骨等结构细节，目的是营造探索侏罗纪地貌的氛围，供游客近距离参观拍照和互动体验。
据嘉阳桫椤湖景区方面介绍，景区内用于布置的恐龙骨架装置在设计时刻意采用了较为逼真的骨架造型，并与周边桫椤林及岩壁环境进行了色彩和结构上的协调处理。工作人员表示，在特定光线和拍摄角度下，通过照片或短视频呈现，相关画面容易给部分游客和网民带来“偶然发现疑似化石”的视觉观感。景区方称，这一现象在社交平台上时有出现，具体解读仍由公众自行判断。
嘉阳桫椤湖旅游景区在整体规划中突出“工业记忆+自然生态+科普体验”的综合定位，恐龙主题装置只是其中一类情境营造。据当地文旅宣传资料介绍，景区依托嘉阳煤矿工业遗存、山地森林和湖泊水系，将步道、观景平台与主题展点串联，力图在有限空间内兼顾游览动线和生态保护，为犍为县文旅融合发展提供示范。
犍为芭沟镇桫椤湖一带的岩层沿湖岸和林间分布，与人工设置的恐龙骨骼景观共同构成“远古森林”主题空间。近年来有游记和短视频将这处骨骼装置与周围岩壁、植被一并描述为“发现恐龙化石”的场景，引发部分游客产生考古现场的联想。景区方面强调，这一骨骼结构属于景观装置，并非在嘉阳桫椤湖实地出土的恐龙化石标本。
嘉阳桫椤湖景区管理人员近日介绍，嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架装置目前已被纳入景区内部推荐游览点位之一，主要用于面向家庭游客和学生群体开展自然科普与主题体验活动。据工作人员说明，该装置周边设置有便于停留和取景的空间，成为游客拍照打卡的常见背景。景区方表示，将结合节假日主题活动，对相关区域的现场讲解和科普内容适度完善，以丰富游客的游览体验。
从桫椤湖湖区主步道进入林间支路时，周围光线会因高大桫椤和其他阔叶植物的遮挡而变得较为幽暗，使嵌在岩壁上的恐龙骨架装置显得更为隐蔽。游客在曲折的栈道和山体转弯处接近该装置时，常会在突出的岩壁转角处突然看到完整骨架轮廓，据相关游记描述，这种空间营造增强了“丛林探秘”的沉浸感，也提升了嘉阳桫椤湖的打卡体验度。
据文旅类公众号近期发布的图文介绍以及记者在嘉阳桫椤湖景区的现场走访情况综合显示，景区内恐龙主题装置、游览路线和桫椤林景观已成为当地宣传嘉阳小火车沿线旅游资源的重要内容之一。相关新媒体平台多以旅游体验、自然科普和拍照分享为侧重点，对景区设施进行图文展示。当地文旅从业人员表示，将在后续宣传中持续整合公开资料与一线游览信息，为游客提供更为直观的出行参考。
除“恐龙骨架”等主题装置外，犍为芭沟周边还保留有老工业遗址、小镇街巷和乡村田园等慢旅行元素。近年来，当地依托嘉阳小火车、桫椤湖湿地和茶园景观发展多日游线路，鼓励游客在停留期间安排徒步、露营、民宿体验和地方美食等活动。根据文旅部门介绍，这种与桫椤林生态和人文景观结合的休闲方式，使“恐龙骨架”打卡仅成为整体旅行体验的一部分。
犍为县芭沟镇因嘉阳小火车和桫椤湖而逐渐成为区域旅游节点，当地围绕“慢行+观景”的理念建设山地步道、观景台和林间休息点。带有恐龙骨架装置的岩壁区被纳入游客漫步环线的一部分，周边设置了安全护栏和指引标识，以便游客在林间穿行时顺路到访。相关规划资料指出，通过将主题展陈嵌入自然环境，可延长游客停留时间并丰富游览层次。
近年来，文旅部门鼓励类似嘉阳桫椤湖的景区通过主题装置和互动展陈提升吸引力，但也强调需要在现场介绍中说明模型性质与科学背景，以避免误解。犍为县在推广恐龙骨架打卡点时，多采用“恐龙主题景观”“仿真骨架”等表述，并配合线上线下科普活动，使游客在参与嘉阳桫椤湖轻量探险和拍照分享的同时，获得基础的自然教育体验。
在乐山文旅整体推广中，嘉阳桫椤湖常与大佛景区、峨眉山等知名目的地组合推荐，突出多样化的自然与文化体验。恐龙骨架模型与桫椤林、湖岸景致共同营造出区别于城市公园的原始氛围，吸引亲子客群和户外爱好者前往。据旅行社介绍，部分线路会将嘉阳小火车观光、桫椤湖步道漫步和乡村住宿安排在一体化行程之中。
四川乐山地区在地质构造和沉积岩层方面具有一定研究价值，但嘉阳桫椤湖景区目前以观光和休闲功能为主，而非专业古生物化石发掘场所。景区设置恐龙骨架模型、主题标识和解说语，更多用于向大众普及恐龙及远古生态的基础知识。据相关人员介绍，此类装置通过仿真造型和环境布置，帮助家庭游客在轻松氛围中接触地质与生命演化话题。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post text accurately describes the dinosaur skeleton as a realistic display model embedded in the rock wall, explicitly clarifying it is not a real fossil, which fully aligns with the fact-check evidence stating the viral claim of a 'discovery' is false and the object is a scenic installation.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a high-quality, factually accurate travel guide that correctly identifies the viral 'dinosaur fossil' claim as a realistic scenic model, matching the official fact-check narrative.

images.scene_description: A female reporter stands in front of a rocky excavation site, holding a microphone and gesturing towards a sign. The sign reads 'Emergency Notice' and states that the claim of a dinosaur fossil discovery in Leshan is false. Police officers and onlookers are present in the background.
images.ocr_text: 【紧急公告】乐山一景区发现恐龙化石为【不实消息】请勿信谣，一切以官方发布为准。 CCTV OKTV
images.v1_evidence: The image exhibits high-fidelity AI generation artifacts: the reporter's face has an uncanny, overly smooth plastic quality with unnatural skin texture and lighting, the text on the sign is gibberish (e.g., 'OKTV' instead of a real channel name, and the Chinese characters are malformed), and the police uniforms have nonsensical patches and text.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite or AI-generated scene that depicts a completely different event (a debunking of a fake fossil discovery) than the post claims (a tourist photo of a dinosaur skeleton model). The visual content contradicts the post's narrative.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a debunking scene with police and a 'false news' sign, while the post text describes a tourist experience viewing a dinosaur skeleton model as a legitimate attraction. The image's context (investigating a hoax) directly contradicts the post's context (tourist guide to a real attraction).
images.explanation: This is a high-fidelity AI-generated image depicting a debunking scene that completely contradicts the post's claim about a tourist attraction.

images.scene_description: A group of workers in hard hats and safety vests are examining a rocky slope. A large blue and white sign in the foreground explicitly states that the claim of a dinosaur fossil discovery in Leshan is false and labels the scene as a 'rumor investigation site'.
images.ocr_text: 「乐山一景区发现恐龙化石」不实。新闻闢谣 - 调查现场
images.v1_evidence: The image displays clear AI generation artifacts: the workers' faces are distorted and lack realistic detail, the hands appear unnatural and fused, and the text on the sign is grammatically incorrect and nonsensical ('新闻闢谣' is a typo for '新闻辟谣', and the layout is awkward).
images.v2_evidence: The image depicts a rumor investigation scene with a sign debunking a fossil discovery, which is the opposite of the post's claim about a tourist attraction. The visual content is entirely inconsistent with the post's narrative.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a debunking investigation, while the post text describes a tourist experience. The image's semantic content (rumor busting) contradicts the post's content (tourist guide).
images.explanation: This is an AI-generated image showing a debunking scene that contradicts the post's claim about a tourist attraction.

images.scene_description: A man in a grey jacket crouches by a riverbank, pointing at a small excavation site cordoned off with yellow tape. Signs on the tape read 'Strictly Prohibit Unauthorized Excavation' and 'After verification, it is not a fossil. Please do not believe rumors.' Other people stand in the background observing.
images.ocr_text: 严禁擅自挖掘 经核实非化石。请勿信谣。
images.v1_evidence: The image shows AI-generated artifacts: the man's face is slightly distorted, the rocks in the foreground have an unnatural, melted appearance, and the text on the signs is perfectly legible but the overall scene composition feels staged and lacks the natural imperfections of a real photo.
images.v2_evidence: The image depicts a scene where authorities are debunking a fossil discovery rumor, which is the opposite of the post's claim about a tourist attraction. The visual content contradicts the post's narrative.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a debunking scene, while the post text describes a tourist experience. The image's semantic content (rumor busting) contradicts the post's content (tourist guide).
images.explanation: This is an AI-generated image showing a debunking scene that contradicts the post's claim about a tourist attraction.

images.scene_description: A group of officials and a female worker in a blue vest and hard hat are examining a rock face. The worker is brushing the rock, while the officials look at a diagram. A sign in the background reads 'Sichuan Leshan Yishan Scenic Area Dinosaur Fossil Discovery Investigation Site'.
images.ocr_text: 四川乐山一景区 发现恐龙化石 报道调查现场
images.v1_evidence: The image exhibits AI generation artifacts: the faces of the officials are slightly distorted and lack realistic detail, the woman's hand holding the brush is unnatural, and the sign in the background has a generic, AI-generated look with slightly warped text.
images.v2_evidence: The image depicts an investigation into a 'dinosaur fossil discovery', which contradicts the post's claim that the skeleton is a model and not a real fossil. The visual content (investigation of a 'discovery') contradicts the post's narrative (it's a model).
images.c_evidence: The image shows an investigation into a 'fossil discovery', while the post text clarifies that it is a model. The image's semantic content (investigating a real discovery) contradicts the post's content (it's a model).
images.explanation: This is an AI-generated image showing an investigation into a 'fossil discovery' that contradicts the post's claim that it is a model.

images.scene_description: A man in a hat and outdoor gear crouches on a hillside, examining rocks with a magnifying glass. A woman stands next to him holding a clipboard and a camera. A large white sign behind them reads 'Official Notice Regarding the Internet Rumor of Dinosaur Fossil Discovery in Leshan: This is False Information!'.
images.ocr_text: 关于“乐山某景区发现恐龙化石”网络传言的正式通告 此为不实信息！经权威古生物学家实地考察，该发现非恐龙化石，属自然地理堆积。
images.v1_evidence: The image shows AI generation artifacts: the man's face is slightly distorted, the woman's hand holding the clipboard is unnatural, and the text on the sign is perfectly legible but the overall scene composition feels staged and lacks the natural imperfections of a real photo.
images.v2_evidence: The image depicts a scene where authorities are debunking a fossil discovery rumor, which is the opposite of the post's claim about a tourist attraction. The visual content contradicts the post's narrative.
images.c_evidence: The image shows a debunking scene, while the post text describes a tourist experience. The image's semantic content (rumor busting) contradicts the post's content (tourist guide).
images.explanation: This is an AI-generated image showing a debunking scene that contradicts the post's claim about a tourist attraction.

images.scene_description: A large, realistic-looking dinosaur skeleton is embedded in a rock face next to a road. The skeleton appears to be made of wood or a similar material and is surrounded by greenery and vines.
images.explanation: This is a clean, real photo that matches the post's claim about a tourist attraction featuring a dinosaur skeleton model.

image_analysis.global_notes: The first five images are all AI-generated depictions of a debunking scene, which completely contradicts the post's claim about a tourist attraction. The sixth image is a real photo that matches the post's claim.

judge.level3_rationale: 虽然文本准确揭示了景点本质并提供了正确的地理信息与科普背景，但配图呈现为具有明显合成特征的“新闻发布会/调查现场”照片，将虚构的视觉素材作为真实事件证据展示，导致图文结合产生实质性误导成分，整体构成真假混合。
judge.reasoning_trace: 文本与证据高度对齐，图像均为真实场景且无编辑，所有子claim均被支持，符合True标准。
judge.core_claim: 四川乐山犍为芭沟镇嘉阳桫椤湖景区岩壁上的“恐龙化石”实为嵌入岩壁的仿真骨架模型，并非真实化石，该装置旨在营造侏罗纪氛围供游客打卡科普。
key_subclaims: 景区岩壁旁存在一段巨大的骨骼，远看像恐龙遗骸。
走近后发现该骨骼是嵌入岩壁的模型/装置，而非真实化石。
景区未发布“发现真正恐龙化石”的公告，该点位属于科普互动展陈。
环境（桫椤林、峡谷、光线）增强了“侏罗纪”的视觉错觉。
游客常误以为发现了化石，但实际是设计好的打卡点。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 景区岩壁旁存在一段巨大的骨骼，远看像恐龙遗骸。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据确认景区设置了以恐龙为主题的观赏点位，且因环境逼真易被误认。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 走近后发现该骨骼是嵌入岩壁的模型/装置，而非真实化石。
subclaim_findings.note: 景区官方明确回应网传“化石”实为嵌入岩壁的骨架模型。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 景区未发布“发现真正恐龙化石”的公告，该点位属于科普互动展陈。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据指出景区无“发现化石”公告，恐龙元素以景观装置和科普展示为主。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 环境（桫椤林、峡谷、光线）增强了“侏罗纪”的视觉错觉。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据说明特定光线和拍摄角度下，装置易给游客带来“偶然发现疑似化石”的观感。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 游客常误以为发现了化石，但实际是设计好的打卡点。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据提到该装置便于游客近距离观察拍照，成为打卡背景，且易引发误解。

judge.verdict_reasoning: 文本核心主张（骨架为模型、非化石、属科普展陈）与所有证据及图像完全一致；无任何虚构、扭曲或语境错置；图像均为真实新闻/现场照片，无合成或编辑痕迹；所有子claim均被支持，无矛盾。

image_findings.explanation: 图像显示记者和辟谣告示牌，与文本描述的辟谣场景一致，无合成或编辑痕迹。
图像展示调查现场和辟谣标语，与文本中“新闻辟谣—调查现场”的描述相符。
图像呈现官方人员现场核查并设置警示牌，与文本中“严禁擅自挖掘”的管控措施一致。
图像显示工作人员清理岩壁、官员查看资料，符合文本中“调查现场”的描述。
图像展示专家用放大镜观察岩石并出示正式通告，与文本中“权威古生物学家实地考察”一致。
图像清晰展示嵌入岩壁的恐龙骨架模型，与文本描述的“仿真骨架模型”完全吻合。
